name: Jumbo Cream Cheese Peanut Butter Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 Roll Of Refrigerated Slice 'n' Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Roll out the cookie dough onto a 12-inch pizza pan.
3. Bake for 12 to 13 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool until cold to the touch.
4. In a small bowl, combine the peanut butter, cream cheese, sugar, salt, margarine, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Beat on medium speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
6. Spread the mixture onto the cooled cookies and sprinkle with chopped peanuts.
7. Cut into wedges.
